Home › SKM Programmes › SKM Pest Services Operation
SKM Level 3 Programme

SKM – Pest
Services Operation

The Certificate in Pest Services Operation is a SKM Level 3 certificate course fully funded by Perbadanan Tabung Kemahiran (PTPK). Graduates are eligible for employment in pest control companies as Pest Control Operators. The course is also open to civil servants in Local Authorities and District Health Offices. All Competency Units follow National Occupational Standards (Jabatan Pembangunan Kemahiran Malaysia).

1 Year 3 Months Intake: June & December
Enrol Now

Accreditation

Code: LE-050-3-2013 Local / Malaysian Only

Why Choose DIT?

  • ✓ Full scholarship & job placements from partner hospitals
  • ✓ MOHE & MQA accredited programmes
  • ✓ 30+ years affiliated with Damai Service Hospital
  • ✓ Fully funded by PTPK (Perbadanan Tabung Kemahiran)
  • ✓ Monthly allowance of RM600 or RM800 per month

Advantages of Studying at DIT

MOHE & MQA Accredited — All programmes approved by Ministry of Higher Education
PTPTN Loans — Financial assistance available for eligible Malaysian students
Hostel Accommodation — Established condominiums with full facilities nearby
Job Placements — Scholarship partnerships with partner hospitals
Qualified Faculty — Registered lecturers and clinical instructors
30+ Years Excellence — Affiliated with Damai Service Hospital

Entry Requirements

Entry Requirements

Ages between 16 – 45
Able to read and write
In good physical health

About This Programme

The Certificate in Pest Services Operation is a SKM Level 3 certificate course fully funded by Perbadanan Tabung Kemahiran (PTPK). Graduates are eligible for employment in pest control companies as Pest Control Operators. The course is also open to civil servants in Local Authorities and District Health Offices. All Competency Units follow National Occupational Standards (Jabatan Pembangunan Kemahiran Malaysia).

Course Modules

•Course Modules

  • LE-050-3:2013-C01 – Pest Infested Site Inspection
  • LE-050-3:2013-C02 – Residual (Chemical) Spraying Technique
  • LE-050-3:2013-C03 – Baiting System Treatment
  • LE-050-3:2013-C04 – Pest Trapping Treatment
  • LE-050-3:2013-C05 – Pesticide Injection Treatment
  • LE-050-3:2013-C06 – Space Treatment (Fogging & Misting)
  • LE-050-3:2013-C07 – Dusting & Caulking Treatment
  • LE-050-3:2013-C08 – Fumigation Treatment Operation
  • LE-050-3:2013-C09 – Pest Services Operation Supervision
  • LE-050-3:2013-C10 – Pest Services Equipment Maintenance
  • Module TVET: Kawalan Penyakit Berjangkit

Career Prospects

Pest Control OperatorPest Services SupervisorOccupational Safety OfficerIndustrial HygienistEnvironmental Health OfficerFood Inspection Officer

Future Education Pathways

→SKM Level 3 (min. CGPA 2.75) → Diploma in Occupational Health & Safety
→SKM Level 3 (min. CGPA 2.75) → Diploma in Environmental Health
